method: Count all parameter-grid combinations implied by each candidate optimization_schema. The API adaptive optimizer may sample/refine internally, but these are the material candidate variants made available per thesis.

counts.thesis: Bollinger middle-band continuation with RSI quality filter avoids late upper-band chases.
MACD confirmation plus RSI ceiling filters low-quality momentum and euphoric entries.
Dual EMA trend alignment reduces whipsaw while ROC handles exit discipline.
Volume participation confirms that trend continuation has market sponsorship.
EMA trend + ROC acceleration + RSI regime avoids weak or overextended continuation.
EMA slope confirms that momentum is persistent, not just above-trend noise.
ADX regime guard accepts fewer entries but targets smoother trend periods.
ATR-adjusted breakout enters only when trend continuation clears normal daily noise.
